sglang.title: Fix sgl-kernel cu118 compile issue
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fix the sgl-kernel compile error in cu118:
trt_reduce_internal.cu(306): error: identifier "cudaGridDependencySynchronize" is undefined
trt_reduce_internal.cu(355): error: identifier "cudaTriggerProgrammaticLaunchCompletion" is undefined

sglang.title: Remove unused var in moe_align_kernel
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fix warning variable "lane_id" was declared but never referenced.

sglang.title: Support cutlass Int8 gemm
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Support fused int8 gemm for W8A8 quantization.
Tested on A100 with benchmark script benchmark/bench_int8_gemm.py (measured with GB/s):
N = 4096, K = 8192
   batch_size  vllm int8 gemm  sgl-kernel int8 gemm
0         1.0     1502.728206           1604.403733
1        16.0    24009.266126

sglang.title: Support llamafy/Qwen-Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-llamafied
sglang.author: Xu-Chen
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Some models can be converted into the LlamaForCausalLM, but attention_bias may need to set True. Additionally, introducing a bias parameter within LlamaAttention is required to accommodate these models，like llamafy/Qwen-Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-llamafied
{
  "architectures": [
    "LlamaForCau

sglang.title: feat: add devcontainer.json for VSCode development
sglang.author: observerw
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Using the devcontainer feature provided by VSCode makes it easy to develop with containers, simplifying the process of manually creating docker/dockerfile.dev.
Modifications

Add a .devcontainer/devcontainer.json file.
Checklist

 Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.
 Add

sglang.title: Clean up eagle code
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Remove redundant code and simplify the logic.

sglang.title: Enable Nvidia's ModelOpt fp8 quantized models
sglang.author: Edwardf0t1
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
As discussed in our sync meeting @merrymercy @Ying1123 , we aim to contribute to SGLang by integrating NVIDIA's TensorRT Model Optimizer (ModelOpt) with optimized and quantized models, fostering collaboration to enhance the open-source inference ecosystem.
Modifications
This PR serves as

sglang.title: Add generator-style run_batch function
sglang.author: xingyaoww
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds a new generator_style parameter to run_batch that allows yielding results as they become available, while maintaining the performance benefits of batch processing. This is particularly useful when you want to process results as soon as they are ready, for example to save them to disk.
C

sglang.title: Update README.md
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: add new contributors @coolhok @jjjjohnson so they can trigger the CI automatically.

sglang.title: add  benchmark_moe_align_blocks
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
h100:
python3 /opt/dlami/nvme/bbuf/sglang/benchmark/kernels/fused_moe_triton/benchmark_moe_align_blocks.py --save_path /opt/dlami/nvme/bbuf/configs
✅ CUDA and Triton implementations match
moe-align-block-size-performance:
     batch_size  seq_len         CUDA       Triton
0           1.0      1.0

vllm.title: k8s-config: Update the secret to use stringData
vllm.author: surajssd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Right now the secret config documentation uses
data which expects the value (from the key
vaue pair) to be base64 encoded. Instead, we can
use stringData which expects the value to be
plain text. This way we don't need to make the
documentation overly complicated.

vllm.title: [VLM] Separate out profiling-related logic
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The multi-modal processor class is getting pretty bloated. This PR separates out profiling-related logic into a new class vllm.multimodal.profiling.BaseProfilingInfo.
Meanwhile, the utility functions that are used for both profiling and processing (usually relating to calculating the number of place

vllm.title: [Doc][2/N] Reorganize Models and Usage sections
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Renamed Usage section to Features.

Moved Performance and Tuning page to Performance section, and renamed it to Optimization and Tuning.
Moved Engine Arguments, Environment Variables, Usage Stats Collection pages to Serving section.
To conserve space, Quantization and Automatic Prefix Caching are no

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix max image size for LLaVA-Onevision
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt: LLaVA-Onevision has dynamic resolution support similar to LLaVA-NeXT, but currently the profiling info assumes it's static like LLaVA. This PR fixes this issue by adding the same override function to get the max possible ImageSize for profiling.

vllm.title: [doc] explain how to add interleaving sliding window support
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: to avoid the case of #11583 happening again.

vllm.title: [Bugfix][V1] Fix molmo text-only inputs
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Reproduce Code
import os
from vllm import LLM, SamplingParams


os.environ["VLLM_USE_V1"] = "1"


MODEL_NAME = "allenai/Molmo-7B-D-0924"
llm = LLM(
    model=MODEL_NAME,
    trust_remote_code=True,
    tensor_parallel_size=1,
    gpu_memory_utilization=0.7,
    enforce_eager=True,
)

stop_token_ids

vllm.title: [Kernel] Move attn_type to Attention.__init__()
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Move attn_type to Attention.init(), so that we can get attn_type from the Attention class.
It is needed by

#11382 which needs to know whether the kv_cache is a decoder/encoder_decoder/encoder by analyzing the Attention class
#11677 to bind kv_cache to the correct Attention module

It also moves the

vllm.title: [V1] Extend beyond image modality and support mixed-modality inference with Llava-OneVision
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Goal of this PR:

Extends V1 support for multimodal models beyond image modality for models with merged input processor.
Infrastructure support non-interleaving mixed-modality inference (e.g, <image><image><video>What are described in these items?) for models with merged input processor.
Adds V1 sup

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix LLaVA-NeXT feature size precision error (for real)
vllm.author: DarkLight1337

vllm.title: [Model] Future-proof Qwen2-Audio multi-modal processor
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR updates the Qwen2-Audio multi-modal processor so that it will not be broken
by huggingface/transformers#35534 once released.
I have tested this locally using the example script and copying the new version of HF processor into my transformers installation.

vllm.title: [XPU] Make pp group initilized for pipeline-parallelism
vllm.author: yisustc
vllm.bodyExcerpt: On XPU device, Point-to-point communication as the first call is not supported now, use a simple all-reduce as a WA for pp communicators init to avoid this error.

vllm.title: [Doc][3/N] Reorganize Serving section
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Split up Serving section into two sections: Inference and Serving, and Deployment.

Separated frameworks and integrations (the latter provides a way to use vLLM automatically without you having to setup vLLM yourself)
Moved Multimodal Inputs page to Inference and Serving section.
Added a new Offline

vllm.title: [Kernel][LoRA]Punica prefill  kernels fusion
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This PR has accomplished the following tasks:

Performed horizontal fusion on the shrink and expand kernel of sgmv, enabling support for multiple (1-3) subLoRAs.
This optimization reduces Triton kernel calls in MergedColumnParallelLinearWithLoRA and MergedQKVParallelLinearWithLora, lowering

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Update attention interface in `Whisper`
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt: #11690 updated the interface of attention and moved the attention type to the initialization time, but whisper.py was not updated accordingly and broke the CI on main. This PR fixes it.

vllm.title: [CI] Fix neuron CI and run offline tests
vllm.author: liangfu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is intend to fix the CI for the neuron backend, where previously the neuron backend was not effectively tested.
The fix contains:

Hack dockerd-entrypoint.py file in the docker image, to allow running bash scripts
Separated image_name and container_name in the bash script, in order to build/

vllm.title: fix init error for MessageQueue when n_local_reader is zero
vllm.author: XiaobingSuper
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This pull request includes a small but important change to the vllm/distributed/device_communicators/shm_broadcast.py file. The change ensures that the buffer_handle parameter is correctly set to None if self.buffer is not initialized, preventing potential errors.

vllm.author: russellb

If there is support for this proposal, we should name an initial group for the
vulnerability management team. I'm happy to serve in the role if the project
maintainers are interested, but I am of course happy to put any names here that
you see fit.

vllm.title: [CI][CPU] adding build number to docker image name
vllm.author: zhouyuan
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This patch added the build number to docker image name so we could build docker images concurrently on one server
